description_long: This is a modern athletic running shoe featuring a dynamic, multi-material construction. The upper is primarily white with abstract black and gray graphic overlays, giving it a contemporary, urban aesthetic. The midsole is thick and sculpted, transitioning from white at the front to a textured, reddish-brown at the heel, suggesting enhanced cushioning and support. Black laces run through reinforced eyelets, and the interior lining appears to be black for contrast and comfort. The shoe's design includes a pronounced arch and a slightly upturned toe, typical of performance footwear. Subtle branding and technical details are visible on the lateral side, enhancing its sporty appeal.
description: A modern, graphic-patterned running shoe with a thick, sculpted sole and black laces, blending white, black, and reddish-brown tones for a striking urban look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded white toe, black laces, and the shoe's symmetrical shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the abstract black and gray graphics, thick white-to-brown midsole, and visible branding.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel's reddish-brown textured sole and the white heel collar with a black accent.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the graphic overlays, sculpted sole, and technical details.
